data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Drops Below 2,400 USDT with a Narrowed 3.31% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 22, 2026, 14:33 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has dropped below 2,400 USDT and is now trading at 2,393.120117 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 3.31% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Significant EVAA Token Distribution Observed
data.description:
According to Arkham's monitoring, a multi-signature address (0x946) has distributed a total of 2.499 million EVAA tokens to 10 different addresses within the past 10 minutes. The transactions included transferring 250,000 EVAA to five addresses one minute ago and 1.249 million EVAA to another five addresses nine minutes ago. According to Odaily, CMC data indicates that the current circulating supply of EVAA is 6.61 million tokens, with this distribution accounting for approximately 37.8% of the total circulating supply.

Some of the recipient addresses have already transferred the tokens to exchanges or sold them on decentralized exchanges.

data.title: Hyperliquid announced the establishment of a policy center in the US to promote transparency in the regulation of the decentralized derivatives market.
data.description: According to official sources, Hyperliquid has established the Hyperliquid Policy Center (HPC) in the United States. Funded by the Hyper Foundation, this organization aims to advocate for legal clarity and protection for users and developers in the US. HPC will focus on the on-chain perpetual contract space, advocating for a regulatory framework that reflects the advantages of decentralized markets and addressing the current US legal framework's reliance on centralized intermediaries, which prevents retail investors from legally participating in decentralized derivatives trading. HPC is committed to establishing legitimate domestic pathways for participation in a full range of financial instruments, including on-chain perpetual contracts, spot digital assets, prediction markets, and tokenized securities.

data.title: Iranian media: Iran currently has no plans to hold negotiations with the United States on Friday.
data.description: According to Iran's Tasnim News Agency, Iran currently has no plans to hold talks with the United States on Friday. (Jinshi)

data.title: Impact of Iran Conflict on Clean Tech Investments Discussed in Live Q&A
data.description: Bloomberg posted on X that a live Q&A session is currently underway, exploring the potential acceleration of clean tech investments due to the ongoing conflict in Iran. Journalists are addressing questions related to financial trends and investment strategies in the clean technology sector. The discussion aims to provide insights into how geopolitical tensions might influence the pace and direction of investments in sustainable energy solutions. Participants are encouraged to engage with experts to understand the broader implications for the industry.

data.title: A whale bought 19,300 ETH, making a profit of $1.453 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, a DeFi whale (0x8ad...b818) withdrew 19,300 ETH from an exchange on April 21st at an average price of $2,304, worth approximately $44.47 million. Of this, 14,062.14 ETH have been requested for redemption. Two hours ago, the whale deposited 6,300 ETH not currently held in ether.fi into Binance; if sold, this would yield a profit of approximately $570,000. The portion of the ETH held by this address yesterday is currently showing a floating profit of $1.453 million.

data.title: Trump's $400M White House Ballroom Project Raises Concerns Over Donor Anonymity
data.description: A recently revealed contract for U.S. President Donald Trump's $400 million White House ballroom project permits donors to remain anonymous and limits conflict-of-interest oversight. According to NS3.AI, the document was made public following a lawsuit and court order, drawing attention to previous fundraising events attended by cryptocurrency executives.

data.description: On Apr 22, 2026, 14:15 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 79,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 79,059.4375 USDT, with a narrowed 4.22% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: HIVE Raises $115M for Data Center Expansion, Keel Exits Latin America
data.description: HIVE has successfully raised $115 million to expand its data centers, according to CoinDesk. Concurrently, Keel is exiting the Latin American market, redirecting its funds into high-performance computing (HPC) and artificial intelligence (AI) sectors. Both companies saw their stocks climb by 4% following these strategic moves.

data.title: BlackRock's BTC holdings reached 806,700 coins, a record high value of $63.73 billion.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, BlackRock has been continuously increasing its BTC holdings recently, reaching 806,700 BTC ($63.73 billion), a record high.

data.title: European Central Bank Unconcerned About Digital Euro Vote Delay
data.description:
European Central Bank Executive Board member Piero Cipollone has expressed minimal concern regarding the postponement of a crucial vote in the European Parliament concerning the digital euro initiative. According to Bloomberg, the vote, initially scheduled for early May, has been deferred to mid-June. Cipollone emphasized that the delay is not expected to significantly impact the progress of the digital euro project, which aims to modernize the European financial system and enhance digital transactions across the continent.

The digital euro project is a pivotal step in the European Central Bank's strategy to adapt to the evolving digital landscape and ensure the euro remains competitive in the global market. Cipollone reassured stakeholders that the delay would not hinder the project's timeline or objectives. The European Central Bank remains committed to advancing the digital euro, which is anticipated to provide a secure and efficient alternative to existing digital payment methods. The initiative is part of a broader effort to strengthen the euro's position in the digital economy and address challenges posed by private digital currencies and payment systems.

Despite the delay, Cipollone remains optimistic about the project's future, highlighting the importance of thorough legislative processes to ensure the digital euro's successful implementation. The European Central Bank continues to engage with policymakers and industry experts to refine the project's framework and address potential concerns. Cipollone's confidence in the project's resilience underscores the European Central Bank's dedication to fostering innovation and maintaining the euro's relevance in an increasingly digital world. The digital euro is expected to play a crucial role in enhancing financial inclusion and providing a reliable digital currency option for European citizens and businesses.

data.title: UBS Faces New Regulatory Requirements to Prevent Credit Suisse-Like Issues
data.description: UBS is set to face new regulatory proposals that will require the bank to maintain approximately $20 billion in additional capital buffers. Wall Street Journal (Markets) posted on X that these measures aim to prevent a recurrence of the issues that led to the downfall of Credit Suisse. The Swiss financial regulator is implementing these changes to bolster the stability of the banking sector and ensure that UBS can withstand potential financial shocks. This move comes in the wake of Credit Suisse's collapse, which highlighted vulnerabilities within the banking system. The additional capital requirements are part of a broader strategy to enhance the resilience of major financial institutions and safeguard against systemic risks.

data.title: Grant Cardone Highlights Bitcoin's Trading Efficiency Compared to Precious Metals
data.description: Grant Cardone emphasized the efficiency of trading Bitcoin, noting that transactions can be completed in approximately five minutes. According to NS3.AI, Cardone contrasted this with the challenges of selling large quantities of precious metals, such as $10 million worth of gold, which often attract offers 20%–30% below market value. He also mentioned that sellers of 10,000 pieces of silver are experiencing bids around 30% below market price.

data.title: Adam Back Denies Satoshi Nakamoto Claims at Paris Blockchain Week
data.description: Adam Back, a prominent figure in the cryptocurrency community, has denied claims that he is Satoshi Nakamoto, the mysterious creator of Bitcoin, during his appearance at Paris Blockchain Week. According to NS3.AI, Bitcoin attributed to Satoshi Nakamoto is currently valued at approximately $80 billion. Meanwhile, Jean-Didier Berger, a delegate from France's interior ministry, reported that the country has experienced 41 crypto-related kidnappings since the beginning of 2026.

data.title: The USDC Treasury minted an additional 200 million USDC on Ethereum.
data.description: According to Whale Alert, the USDC Treasury minted 200 million new USDC on Ethereum.

data.title: Iranian media: Iran has not yet decided to hold talks on Friday.
data.description: According to Iran's Tasnim News Agency, Iran has not yet decided to hold negotiations on Friday. (Jinshi)

data.title: EU's MiCA Transition Period Ends, Impacting Crypto Asset Service Providers
data.description: The transition period for the European Union's Markets in Crypto-Assets (MiCA) regulation concluded on July 1, requiring crypto asset service providers to obtain licenses to continue serving EU clients. According to NS3.AI, firms that fail to secure authorization must cease operations within the EU. Smaller companies are particularly affected by increased costs related to authorization, governance, and reporting as national grandfathering windows close. Hybrid and decentralized finance projects face additional challenges due to the narrow and unclear decentralization exemption.

data.title: India Agrees to Purchase Urea at Increased Prices in Latest Tender
data.description: India, recognized as the world's largest importer of urea, has consented to procure the nitrogen-based fertilizer at significantly elevated prices compared to its previous tender. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the country's strategic move to secure essential agricultural inputs amid fluctuating global market conditions. This decision underscores India's commitment to maintaining its agricultural productivity despite the financial implications of rising costs. The agreement reflects broader trends in the global fertilizer market, where prices have been influenced by various geopolitical and economic factors.

data.title: Iranian Foreign Minister: The current situation in the Strait of Hormuz is caused by the United States and Israel.
data.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Araqchi stated on the 22nd, according to Iranian media reports, that the current situation in the Strait of Hormuz is a direct result of the military strikes launched by the United States and Israel against a UN member state. The report said that Araqchi spoke by phone with Italian Foreign Minister Tajani, exchanging views on regional developments and the security, legal, and economic impacts of the US-Israeli military strikes against Iran. Araqchi said that Iran, as a littoral state of the Strait of Hormuz, has taken measures in accordance with international law to safeguard its national security from US and Israeli aggression and threats. He emphasized that the consequences for the global economy should be borne by the aggressors. Araqchi also stated that the US-Israeli strikes against Iran's peaceful nuclear facilities are unacceptable, and the silence of some European countries on such actions is a "double standard" that is undermining international law and non-proliferation mechanisms. Tajani emphasized that achieving peace and stability in the Persian Gulf region is crucial, and Italy is willing to play a positive role in promoting overall regional stability. (Xinhua)
